name: atlas-dropoff
displayName: Atlas Drop-off — onboarding & funnel drop-off on your real screens
description: Integrates the @revyl/atlas-analytics SDK into an Expo/React Native app and generates a drop-off report from Revyl Atlas + PostHog: detects the router, wires AtlasProvider, verifies atlas_screen events, maps routes to Atlas nodes, and renders report.html on the app's real screenshots.
